creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 209432
svn .diff

Version Update 1.5.2 -> 1.6

Port Update

 * update DEP: devel/sysctlmibinfo -> devel/libsysctlmibinfo2
 * delete DEP: sysutils/sysctlinfo-kmod (sysctlmibinfo2 handles sysctl/kernel stuff)

Testing:

 * portlint -C
 * poudriere testport -j 130Camd64 -p default -o deskutils/sysctlview


Please commit it,

Thanks,
Alfonso
